get.description: Returns account profile, order volume, revenue, average order value, and top product categories for a customer.
Returns monthly order count and revenue trend points for the requested customer and time range (for example 90d, 6m, 1y).
Returns spend distribution by product category and top purchased products for the customer.
Returns aggregate order and revenue performance for a region, including top reps.
Returns pipeline and win metrics for a sales rep, including top revenue customers.
Calculates a heuristic risk score and signal list for an account based on recency, trend, and product concentration.
Finds products not yet purchased by the customer but commonly purchased by peer customers.
Generates an account-level strategic narrative using summary metrics, deal risk, and top cross-sell recommendations.

post.description: Creates a suggested follow-up task payload with generated priority and due date.
Generates a draft outbound email aligned to the provided strategy and account opportunities.
